pageContext.name: Thor (Jane Foster) Bishoujo
pageContext.description: The Goddess of Thunder was quick to receive a Bishoujo statue by Shunya Yamashita. Appearing out of thin air, the mysterious figure, Lady Thor, is none other than Jane Foster! Holding Mjolnir aloft, Thor stands in a pose fit for the God of Thunder.  Her muscular figure is strengthened by the power of Mjolnir, wearing a silver helmet and armor, and a fluttering cape that gives the Thor statue the elegance of a refined Asgardian. The statue can be displayed without the helmet by exchanging it with a separate head part.  The Marvel figure base can be connected to that of the Loki Laufeyson Bishoujo Statue — sold separately.
